records.title: Note summary workflow reuse
records.task: Generate a concise summary from a Markdown note.

metacode.approach: Reuse existing io.read_markdown_file + text.clean_text_basic + text.simple_summary workflow path.
metacode.notes: Failure produced structured missing_fields and a reusable fixed workflow.

traditional_ai.approach: Ask AI to write a one-off Markdown summary script from scratch.
traditional_ai.notes: Output can work, but the path is not captured as a reusable workflow asset.

result.takeaway: MetaCode becomes more valuable after reusable capabilities and failure repair records already exist.

records.title: Repair chain traceability
records.task: Diagnose a broken workflow and produce a verified repair path.

metacode.approach: Use missing_fields diagnosis, fixed/planned repair, repair_id, and repair event export.
metacode.notes: Repair can be traced from failure to suggestion to generated workflow to verification.

traditional_ai.approach: Paste the error into AI and ask for a corrected workflow manually.
traditional_ai.notes: Manual repair may succeed, but traceability depends on chat history.

result.takeaway: Structured repair events are the main advantage over ad hoc prompting.
